lessons.title: Unit 1A : Nature - Lesson 3: Is there any wind?
lessons.desc:
- sun, sky, cloud, wind, rainbow
- Is there any wind? Yes, there is (some wind)./ No, there isn't (any wind)

pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: Okay, now I want you to say the word one more time! Let's go!
Okay, let's say the word one more time! Let's go!
Okay! Repeat  again one more time!
Ok Repeat again one more time!
Now, I want you to read the question one more time! Let's go!
Now, let's read the answer, please!
Now, let's read the question one more time!
Okay! Listen and repeat one more time: Is there any Sun?

pronunciation_drills.expected_transcript: I can see there're some clouds.
pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: I can see there're some clouds.
pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: I can see there some cloud

pronunciation_detail.matched_transcripts_ipa: aɪ kæn siː ðer sʌm klaʊd

brainstorm.question: What can you see?
brainstorm.user_transcript: I can see a rock, I can see a tree, I can see a rainbow.

brainstorm.question: Anything else?
brainstorm.user_transcript: I can see a rainbow, I can see a tree.

brainstorm.question: What can you see?
brainstorm.user_transcript: I can see a sun, I can see a rainbow can and I can see a tree.

conversation.question: Hello! Are you having a good time today? 🤩 What's your favorite thing about today?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am. / No, I am not.

conversation.question: Great! Do you like looking at the sky? ☁️ What do you see there?
conversation.expected_transcript: I can see the sun.

conversation.question: Wonderful! I love the sun too. ☀️ Does the sun make you happy?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, it does.

conversation.question: That's great! Do you like rainbows? 🌈 What colors do you see in a rainbow?
conversation.expected_transcript: I like red, yellow, and blue.
conversation.user_transcript: I like red, yellow, and blue.

conversation.question: Fantastic! I see those colors too. 🎨 Do you like windy days? 🌬️
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.

conversation.question: Awesome! What do you like to do when it's windy? 🪁
conversation.expected_transcript: I like flying kites.

conversation.question: That's fun! I like flying kites. 😄 Do you see clouds in the sky?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I do.

questions.question_type: Kéo thả vào chỗ trống trong đoạn văn
questions.question_text: Fill in blank missing word (Con hãy điền từ vào chỗ trống.) 1. Is there any [{}]? No, there isn't. 2. Is there [{}] rainbow? Yes, there is. 3. Is there any cloud? [{}], there is. 4. Is [{}] any sky? No, there isn't.: Yes | wind | any | there
questions.comment_plain: Yes: Đúng/ Có wind: gió any: bất kì there: có => Đáp án: 1. Is there any wind? No, there isn't: Có gió không? Không có. 2. Is there any rainbow? Yes, there is: Có cầu vồng không? Có. 3. Is there any cloud? Yes, there is: Có mây không? Có. 4. Is there any sky? No, there isn't: Có bầu trời không? Không có.
questions.correct_answer: 1. Is there any wind? No, there isn't. 2. Is there any rainbow? Yes, there is. 3. Is there any cloud? Yes, there is. 4. Is there any sky? No, there isn't.

lessons.title: Unit 1A : Nature - Lesson 1: There's one spider.
lessons.desc:
-  insects, ant, worm, spider, butterfly, ladybug
- How many spiders are there? - There's one spider./There're three spiders.

pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: Yes, but listen and repeat again.
Let's read the question one more time.
Now, let's read the answer, please!
Great, say it one more time: There is one ant.
Now, let's read the question one more time!
Good! Now, let's read the answer, please!

pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: let's go we'll work on a conversation practice

pronunciation_drills.expected_transcript: I see! How many ants are there?
pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: I see! How many ants are there?
pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: I see how many and are there

pronunciation_detail.matched_transcripts_ipa: aɪ siː haʊ meniː ənd ɑːr ðer

brainstorm.question: Look at the picture and the thing I circled. What is it?

conversation.question: Hi there! 👋 Are you having a fun day learning about nature today?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am having fun.

conversation.question: Great! Do you like insects? 🐛🦋
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like insects./No, I don't like insects.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I like it. No, I don't like ice.

conversation.question: That's okay! Some insects are not so cute. Do you like butterflies? 🦋
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like butterflies./ No, I don't like butterflies.

conversation.question: Cool! Ladybugs are red and black. Have you ever seen a worm? 🪱
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I have, no, I haven't.

conversation.question: Nice! Worms help the plants grow. 🌱 Have you seen an ant today?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.

Match (Con hãy di chuyển các ô ở cột bên phải để nối câu hỏi với câu trả lời đúng.)
questions.comment_plain: 1. How many insects are there? Có bao nhiêu con côn trùng? 2. How many ants are there? Có bao nhiêu con kiến? 3. How many worms are there? Có bao nhiêu con sâu? 4. How many spiders are there? Có bao nhiêu con nhện? There're three insects: Có 3 con côn trùng. There're two ants: Có 2 con kiến. There're four worms: Có 4 con sâu. There're nine spiders: Có 9 con nhện. => Đáp án: 1 - There're three insects. 2 - There're two ants. 3 - There're four worms. 4 - There're nine spiders.
questions.correct_answer: 1. How many insects are there?→There're three insects.; 2. How many ants are there?→There're two ants.; 3. How many worms are there?→There're four worms.; 4. How many spiders are there?→There're nine spiders.

questions.question_text: Match (Con hãy di chuyển các ô ở cột bên phải để nối câu hỏi với câu trả lời đúng.)
questions.comment_plain: 1. How many insects are there? Có bao nhiêu con côn trùng? 2. How many ants are there? Có bao nhiêu con kiến? 3. How many worms are there? Có bao nhiêu con sâu? 4. How many spiders are there? Có bao nhiêu con nhện? There're three insects: Có 3 con côn trùng. There're two ants: Có 2 con kiến. There're four worms: Có 4 con sâu. There're nine spiders: Có 9 con nhện. => Đáp án: 1 - There're three insects. 2 - There're two ants. 3 - There're four worms. 4 - There're nine spiders.
questions.correct_answer: 1. How many insects are there?→There're three insects.; 2. How many ants are there?→There're two ants.; 3. How many worms are there?→There're four worms.; 4. How many spiders are there?→There're nine spiders.

lessons.title: Unit 1A : Nature - Lesson 2: There're some flowers.
lessons.desc:
- flower, mushroom, tree, leaf (leaves)
-  How many flowers are there? There're some flowers/ There aren't any flowers.

pronunciation_drills.question_prompt: Okay, now I want you to say the word one more time! Let's go!
Now, I want you to read the question one more time! Let's go!
Good! Now, let's read the answer, please!
Okay! Listen and repeat one more time: How many trees are there?
Let's repeat after me There aren't any trees.

pronunciation_drills.user_transcript: next let's practice in a dialogue with me

free_speaking.question: What did you do today? Is there any fun activity?

brainstorm.question: What can you see?
brainstorm.user_transcript: I can see a musroom, trees and flower leaf.

conversation.question: Hi! Are you having a good day? ☀️ Do you like flowers?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like flowers./ No, I don't like flowers.
conversation.user_transcript: I like food. No, I don't.

conversation.question: Food is great! 😋 Do you like trees? I like climbing trees. 🌳
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I do. No, I don't.

conversation.question: That's okay. 😊 What about mushrooms? Have you ever seen a mushroom? 🍄
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I have, no, I haven't.

conversation.question: Cool! Leaves can be pretty. 🍁 What color are the leaves near you?
conversation.expected_transcript: The leaves are green.

conversation.question: Green is a great color! 💚 Do you like green trees or green flowers?
conversation.expected_transcript: I like green trees.

conversation.question: Awesome! 🌳 Do you see any trees when you look outside?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I do. / No, I don't.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I do, no, I don't.

conversation.question: Great! 👍 Are they big trees or small trees?
conversation.expected_transcript: They are big trees.

conversation.question: Hi there! 👋 Are you having fun learning about nature today?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I am having fun.

conversation.question: That's awesome! 😄 Do you like trees? I love climbing trees!
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I like trees./ No, I don't like trees.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I like trees. No, I don't like trees.

conversation.question: Cool! 🌳 What do you like about trees? They give us shade!
conversation.expected_transcript: I like trees because they are big.
conversation.user_transcript: I like trees with the a big.

conversation.question: Big trees are great! 💪 Have you ever seen a mushroom?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I have. / No, I haven't.
conversation.user_transcript: Yes, I have. No, I haven't.

conversation.question: Cool! 🍄 Do you see mushrooms in your garden?
conversation.expected_transcript: Yes, I do. No, I don't.

conversation.question: Awesome! 🤩 What color are the mushrooms you see?
conversation.expected_transcript: They are red.

conversation.question: Oh, right! 👍 Are they red, yellow, or another color?
conversation.expected_transcript: They are red.
